content.claim: The population of children aged 0-4 in Hungary is projected to decline by 5% between 2023 and 2033, representing a 'locked-in' demographic pipeline already born and distinct from future fertility uncertainty.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Demography lens
limitations: Projections assume no net migration; international mobility of families could alter actual cohorts
Does not specify regional distribution of the projected decline
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
